description: Fetch the latest authoritative snapshot for a root key.
Store the snapshot in the local key-value store as the current baseline.
Open the optional event stream for incremental updates.
Apply `set` events as local upserts and treat `--archived` as record state rather than deletion.
Emit `snapshot-replaced` after `setSnapshot` updates the authoritative snapshot for a root key.
When `snapshot-replaced` is received, discard the previous baseline for the root key and refetch the snapshot.
Reject writes whose submitted version is not based on the latest server version.
